backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a calendar resize/reformat feature for DashboardPage, linking it to the relevant file, components, and test ID REQ-14.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose, styling approach, and key implementation details for the AnantJap spiritual PWA.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AnantJap PWA, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing page routing, god selection state, and layout with a LeftSidebar, Header, Footer, and theme/language/devotee providers wrapping all pages.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Empty file — the bottom navigation component has no content, likely replaced by LeftSidebar.
frontend/src/components/FirstLaunchWarni: Displays a dismissible alert warning users that jap data is stored locally and cannot be recovered if the app is deleted; auto-hides after 8 seconds on first launch.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component rendering navigation links to Terms, Privacy, Copyright, and Feedback pages, plus a copyright notice with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/GodCard.tsx: Card component displaying a deity's image, name, mantra, and per-devotee jap/mala counts loaded from localStorage, with optional remove button for custom gods.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header showing the AnantJap brand name and a language selector dropdown supporting Sanskrit, English, Hindi, and Gujarati.
frontend/src/components/LeftSidebar.tsx: Renders a fixed vertical navigation sidebar with icon/image nav items (Home, JapCount, BhajanMarg, Dashboard, Settings), an app logo, and an optional god image slot at the bottom, using tooltips for labels.
frontend/src/contexts/DevoteeContext.tsx: Provides a React context for managing a list of devotees and the currently selected devotee, persisting state to localStorage.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for multi-language support (Sanskrit, English, Hindi, Gujarati) with a translation lookup function `t`, persisting the selected language.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Stub hook that returns an empty object, indicating all data is stored locally and no backend queries are required.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base styles, custom CSS variables for a logo-inspired warm terracotta/cream color palette in both light and dark modes, and font imports.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/BhajanMargPage.tsx: Displays a list of default and custom bhajans (devotional songs) with lyrics, allowing users to add up to 5 custom bhajans and remove non-default ones, with persistence via localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/CopyrightPage.tsx: Static informational page displaying copyright notice, intellectual property terms, restrictions, and attribution details for the AnantJap application.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page showing jap (mantra chanting) statistics per deity via bar charts across daily/weekly/monthly/yearly views, a calendar for selecting dates to inspect day-level data, and an AI-generated spiritual report.
frontend/src/pages/FeedbackPage.tsx: Simple feedback form page with name, optional email, and message fields that simulates submission with a timeout and shows a success toast.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page listing default and custom deity cards for selection, with dialogs to add new devotees or custom gods, persisting custom gods to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/JapCountPage.tsx: Jap counting page for a selected deity that tracks mantra repetitions and mala counts via tap or swipe input, persisting daily history and totals to localStorage per devotee.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPage.tsx: Renders a static Privacy Policy page explaining that AnantJap stores all data locally, collects no personal information, and outlines data security, deletion, and contact details.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page allowing users to toggle theme (light/dark/system), choose jap input method (tap/swipe), and export, import, or delete all local app data.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Renders a static Terms & Conditions page covering use license, local data storage, disclaimers, limitations, and spiritual content policy for AnantJap.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts (Cinzel, Lato), OKLCH-based color tokens including AnantJap brand colors (terracotta, dark-brown, cream), border radius, box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata (version 17) tracking the app summary, known bugs (swipe gesture, image card, header logo, calendar timezone offset), and a list of previously implemented features with their requirement IDs.
